title: Your workspace layout is now yours to arrange, save and share
summary: The shell is one layout tree with three presets (Quiet, Calm, Bench) behind an experiment flag: move any panel between docks from its header menu, drag, or the command palette; save the arrangement as a named workspace node that syncs and can be shared like any document; and let the companion rearrange or scaffold new dockable views through undoable, consent-gated tools.
